lesson.menu_desc: Talk about your past -- past simple (regular & irregular) -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 14 -- My Life Story -- Past Experiences
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 14 -- My Life Story

listenings.text: Hi, this is David. Let me tell you about my past. I was born in a small town. When I was a child, I lived near a river. I studied at a small school and I played football every day. Ten years ago, I moved to the city for a new job. It was a big change, but I was happy. I still remember my childhood with a smile.

Hello, this is Maria. I want to tell you about my childhood. I was born in the south. We lived in a small house with a garden. Last week, I looked at an old photo and I remembered many things. When I was young, I studied music and I sang in a choir. Years ago, we moved to a new city. I had a happy childhood and I have many good memories.

extra_audio.text: First, say hello. Second, say where you were born. Third, say one thing you did when you were a child. Fourth, say what you did last week. Fifth, say goodbye.
